rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEON J. WILLIAMS REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 10/5/99 TRUST
rulings.Rulings: No timely opposition having been filed, the demurrer is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, May 15, 2019.
